corpora.label: arXiv papers
corpora.description: Scientific papers from arXiv (open-licensed subset). Try pasting an abstract, or load one of the examples.

samples.label: Named Entity Recognition without Labelled Data
samples.text: Named Entity Recognition (NER) performance often degrades rapidly when applied to target domains that differ from the texts observed during training.

corpora.label: English Wikipedia
corpora.description: English Wikipedia articles. Try pasting a sentence from an article, or load one of the examples.
corpora.dataset_note: This is the full upstream dataset (a superset) — only a subset of its articles is indexed here. Use the search box below to see exactly what's included.

samples.label: Nova Scotia
samples.text: Nova Scotia is a province located in Eastern Canada. It is one of the three Maritime provinces and one of the four Atlantic provinces.

samples.label: Travel diary — safari in Kenya
samples.text: We flew into Nairobi, as it was our starting point for our overland trip. Nairobi is hustling and bustling with people everywhere, a real high-rise city.
